detaileddescription.para: You can refer to the below stated example applications for more details on how to use sysmonpsu driver.

sect1.title: xsysmonpsu_intr_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XSysmonpsu driver directly. This example shows the usage of the driver in interrupt mode to handle on-chip temperature and voltage alarm interrupts.

sect1.title: xsysmonpsu_low_level_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XSysmonpsu driver directly. This example shows the usage of the low level driver to check the on-chip temperature and voltages.

sect1.title: xsysmonpsu_polled_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XSysmonpsu driver directly. This example shows the usage of the driver in polled mode to check the on-chip temperature and voltages.

sect1.title: xsysmonpsu_single_ch_intr_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XSysmonpsu driver directly. This example shows the usage of the driver in single channel interrupt mode to handle End of Conversion(EOC) and VCCINT alarm interrupts.
